completed_tasks.name: UI redesign: table layout, colored pills, CSS fixes

blockers.description: Human must visually verify updated procurement table in Sanity Studio at /admin

human_actions_pending.action: Open http://localhost:4323/admin, navigate to a project with engagementType full-interior-design, verify colored status pills and table layout look correct
human_actions_pending.context: UI was redesigned this session — verify pill colors are distinct (slate/blue/amber/orange/emerald/green), table has header row, rows align correctly

decisions.decision: renderDefault hidden in absolute-positioned zero-height div
decisions.rationale: Preserves Sanity DnD sortable context while showing custom row layout

decisions.decision: trackingUrl only renders as link when starts with http/https
decisions.rationale: Defense in depth against javascript: protocol injection
Enables unit testing without Sanity Studio runtime

decisions.decision: STATUS_PILL explicit color map instead of @sanity/ui tone system
decisions.rationale: Studio warm beige theme + global [data-ui=MenuButton] CSS override made tone colors invisible; explicit hex values guarantee distinct colors

decisions.decision: ProcurementTableInput as components.input on the array field
decisions.rationale: components.item cannot add column headers; components.input wraps the entire array widget and prepends a header row while calling renderDefault to preserve DnD/Add-item

decisions.decision: PROCUREMENT_COL_WIDTHS exported from ProcurementListItem, imported by ProcurementTableInput
decisions.rationale: Single source of truth for column widths prevents header/row misalignment

decisions.decision: Button mode=bleed + inline backgroundColor for status pill
decisions.rationale: mode=default uses --card-bg-color CSS variable which was overridden by studio.css; bleed mode transparent background lets inline backgroundColor win
Original rule applied warm background to ALL MenuButton elements globally, overriding status pill colors everywhere

decisions.decision: Form editor width 900px via [class*=FormContainer] CSS override
decisions.rationale: Sanity Studio hardcodes FormContainer to 640px; user requested fixed 900px

next_action: User verifies colored status pills and table layout in Sanity Studio at localhost:4323/admin, then commit all 4 files and run gsd-verifier for Phase 23
context_notes: Phase 23 plan 2 was originally complete pending visual verification. This session revealed original UI had no visible status colors (Badge-in-MenuButton styling issue + global CSS variable conflict washing out tones). Full redesign: table layout with ProcurementTableInput header row, STATUS_PILL explicit colors bypassing @sanity/ui theme, CSS scoping fix, row hover state, 900px editor width. 4 files modified but not yet committed — commit after user confirms colors look correct.
